party.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or tax ID
party.emptyCustomer: No customer found — create one in the Customers menu
party.emptyVendor: No vendor found — create one in the Vendors menu

postConfirm.warning: Post is irreversible — corrections require a Credit Note + Reissue (Sec. 86/4 & 86/12).

apAging.title: AP Aging
apAging.emptySubtitle: No posted vendor invoices outstanding as of the selected date.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.subtitle: Monthly payroll runs with PIT withholding (ภ.ง.ด.1) and Social Security
payroll.createHint: Employees active in the period are pulled in and calculated automatically
payroll.postConfirm: Post this run? It becomes immutable once posted.
payroll.payConfirm: Confirm salaries have been transferred to employees?

businessUnit.title: Business Unit
businessUnit.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this Business Unit? Existing documents keep referencing it.
businessUnit.companyToggle: Require Business Unit on revenue documents
businessUnit.companyToggleHint: When on: TI / Receipt / Credit Note / Debit Note must select a BU.
businessUnit.crossBuWarning: This receipt spans {n} BUs: {codes} — allowed (no block)

employee.settingsSubtitle: Employee data for payroll + withholding PIT (ภ.ง.ด.1) + Social Security
employee.name: Name
employee.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this employee? Existing payroll history keeps referencing them.

cust.title: Customers
cust.subtitle: Customer master for sales documents
cust.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this customer? It won't appear when creating new documents.
cust.emptyDesc: Add your first customer to start issuing quotations / tax invoices

err.vatRequired: VAT customers require Tax ID + branch code (ม.86/4 #3)

foreign.nonVatInfo: Non-VAT vendor (revenue < 1.8M or individual) — receipt only, Input VAT not claimable, WHT still applies for services
foreign.noVatDWarning: ⚠ Must withhold WHT 15% (s.70) + self-assess VAT 7% (PND.36) — defaulted on PV/VI
foreign.vatDInfo: ⭕ Registered for Thai VAT — no WHT, claim Input VAT normally (Netflix/Spotify/Adobe/Microsoft)

pv.title: Payment Vouchers
pv.deferNote: PV create/approve is pending a design decision (Question-Backend5) — this view lists posted vouchers only.
pv.vendorNoVat: Vendor is not VAT-registered — no input VAT
pv.postHint: Must be approved before it can be posted
pv.approveWarn: Approving makes the document postable — the approver must not be the creator

selfWithhold.explanation: For auto-charge / gateway-forced vendors — gross-up expense + issue 50tawi (we pay full + remit WHT ourselves)
selfWithhold.autoLockedForeign: ⚠ Foreign vendor — self-withhold WHT 15% (PND.54) + PND.36 reverse charge
selfWithhold.vatDInfo: ℹ Vendor registered for VAT-D — normal flow

createVi.title: Create purchase tax-invoice record
createVi.hint: Pre-fills a vendor-invoice draft from this payment voucher. You then edit it, attach the vendor's tax invoice and post it.
createVi.claimHint: YYYYMM — defaults to the payment-voucher month if left blank.
createVi.alreadyLinked: A purchase tax-invoice record is already linked to this voucher.

wht.title: Withholding Tax Certificates (50 ทวิ)
wht.subtitle: Issued automatically when a PV with WHT is posted — immutable (ม.50 ทวิ)

rc.title: Receipts
rc.confirmWarn: A posted receipt cannot be deleted — correct by issuing a new receipt.

wht.title: Withholding tax
wht.serviceOnlyExplain: WHT base is auto-computed from SERVICE lines (ex-VAT) — adjust manually if needed.
wht.noWhtLines: No items — pick a Tax Invoice first.
wht.noWhtLinesManual: No items — click Add WHT category.
wht.noWhtLinesNonVat: No items — add line items first.
wht.multiCatExplain: WHT split per service category (rent 5% / service 3% / ads 2%) — base is the ex-VAT service portion pro-rated to the amount paid; editable.

whtType.title: WHT Type
whtType.changeRateConfirm: Change rate: closes the current row + inserts a new one from the effective date. Posted documents are unaffected.

report.pnd30NonVat: This company is not VAT-registered, so ภ.พ.30 filing does not apply.
report.pnd30FinalizeConfirm: Finalize ภ.พ.30 for this period? Finalized filings are immutable.

tf.finalizeConfirm: Finalize this period? Finalized filings are immutable.
tf.batchFileHint: FORMAT กลาง .txt for the RD data-transfer program / e-Filing upload
tf.pnd36FinalizeConfirm: Finalize ภ.พ.36? Posts Dr 1170 / Cr 2151 and is immutable.
tf.pnd36JvNote: Finalize posts Dr 1170 Input VAT / Cr 2151 Output VAT (net 0).
tf.missingCertDesc: Posted receipts that withheld WHT but have no customer 50ทวิ certificate number recorded yet — the number can be entered later from the receipt page.
tf.missingCertEmpty: No receipts missing a 50ทวิ certificate in this period.
tf.pnd51Title: ภ.ง.ด.51 (ม.67ทวิ — mid-year CIT prepayment)
tf.pnd51Hint: Due 31 Aug (ม.67ทวิ) · Missing/understating by >25% → surcharge (ม.67ตรี)
tf.pnd51Error: Could not generate ภ.ง.ด.51 PDF
tf.pnd51WorksheetHint: Page 2 can be filled only for a simple normal filing (Method 1, ม.67ทวิ(1), general rate) — all attestations are required because a blank box on this form asserts zero
tf.pnd51WorksheetSme: Page 2 does not support the SME schedule yet — page 1 only (a separate computation sheet may be attached)
tf.pnd51WorksheetIncomplete: All 5 attestations must be checked before generating
tf.pnd51AttestFirstFiling: Normal filing (not an amended ยื่นเพิ่มเติม)
tf.pnd51AttestNoSurcharge: No ม.27 / ม.67ตรี surcharge (box 38 = 0)
tf.pnd51EstimateSaved: Estimate saved for the year-end ม.67ตรี check

cit.title: Corporate income tax (yearly data)
cit.label: Description
cit.pnd50Hint: Fills page 1 + section 1 + section 2 (tax ladder) + the balance sheet from real data. Pages 4–5 (cost/SG&A detail), page 7 (directors' notice) and the attachments still print blank and must be completed manually before filing.
cit.pnd50AttestBlankSchedules: I accept that pages 4–5, page 7 and the attachments print blank
cit.pnd50Error: P.N.D.50 generation failed — see the conditions blocking it above
cit.ladderUnavailable: Ladder cannot be shown (see conditions below)
cit.refusalsTitle: P.N.D.50 cannot be auto-filled for this year:

refusal.override_breaks_ladder: The net-profit override disagrees with the books — the ladder will not foot; file manually or remove the override
refusal.ladder_sign_flip: Adjustments flip the running total's sign mid-ladder; the form has no sign box for that — file manually
refusal.surcharge_with_overpaid: A s.67 ter surcharge with an overpaid bottom line cannot be rendered together
refusal.schedule_breaks_ladder: Detail schedules (items 7/8) do not foot to the computation ladder — accounting data inconsistency; file manually
refusal.disclosure_required: Revenue exceeds THB 200M — the s.71 bis TP Disclosure Form must be filed separately by hand (the return itself still prints)

documents.title: RD Form Documents
documents.subtitle: Every Revenue Department (RD) tax form TEAS touches, with filing deadlines and links to the official forms.
documents.officialNote: Links point to the official forms on the RD website — they open in a new tab and always serve the latest version.

pp30.name: VAT Monthly Return
pp30.deadline: By the 15th (paper) / 25th (e-Filing) of the next month

pp36.name: Self-assessed VAT (imported services)
pp36.deadline: By the 7th (paper) / 15th (e-Filing) of the next month

pp302.name: Input-VAT apportionment (annual adjustment)
pp302.deadline: By the 25th (e-Filing) of the first month of the next year

pp01.name: VAT registration request
pp01.deadline: Within 30 days after revenue crosses the threshold

pnd1.name: WHT — Employment (s.40(1)(2))
pnd1.deadline: By the 7th / 15th of the next month

pnd2.name: WHT — Interest/Dividend (individuals)
pnd2.deadline: By the 7th / 15th of the next month

pnd3.name: WHT — Individual contractors (s.40(5)-(8))
pnd3.deadline: By the 7th / 15th of the next month

pnd53.name: WHT — Thai juristic recipients
pnd53.deadline: By the 7th / 15th of the next month

pnd54.name: WHT — Foreign payment (s.70)
pnd54.deadline: By the 7th / 15th of the next month

pnd50.name: CIT Annual Return
pnd50.deadline: Within 150 days of the fiscal year-end

pnd51.name: CIT Mid-year Prepayment
pnd51.deadline: Within 2 months of the half-year end

pnd52.name: CIT — International transport
pnd52.deadline: Within 150 days of the fiscal year-end

pnd55.name: Income tax — Foundation/Association
pnd55.deadline: Within 150 days of the fiscal year-end

pt40.name: Specific Business Tax Return
pt40.deadline: By the 15th / 25th of the next month

os4.name: Stamp Duty paid in cash
os4.deadline: Within 15 days of executing the instrument

note.confirmWarn: Posting auto-sends e-Tax + customer email (when enabled) and is irreversible — confirm the reason.

states.noAccessBody: This page requires admin permission to view or edit — please contact your system administrator.

companies.title: Manage Companies
companies.subtitle: Company registry + per-company tax settings (Super Admin only)
companies.vatRateInvalid: VAT rate must be a number between 0 and 100%
companies.taxWarning: Every tax-setting change is written to the audit log and applies to newly issued documents immediately (§4.6 — system-level tax config changes only via deploy; per-company values are edited here by a Super Admin).
companies.noAccessBody: This page is for Super Admins only — please contact your system administrator.

companyProfile.title: Company Profile
companyProfile.banner: Legal company changes should be filed with the Revenue Department (ภ.พ.09) and reflected on ภ.พ.20 first.
companyProfile.hardLockedTooltip: Changing this field requires a special process — contact your administrator or file ภ.พ.09 first.
companyProfile.addrWarnBody:
The registered address is part of the company's DBD certificate. Changing it requires filing an amendment with the Department of Business Development (DBD) using forms บอจ.1 and บอจ.4 first; if VAT-registered, also notify the Revenue Department via form ภ.พ.09 within 15 days.

Confirm only after you have filed with DBD/RD — this change is written to the audit log.
companyProfile.paidUpCapitalHelp: Used for SME classification for corporate income tax (capital ≤ 5M and revenue ≤ 30M)

common.nonVatUnavailable: This feature is for VAT-registered businesses only — your company is set to non-VAT and cannot issue Tax Invoices / Credit-Debit Notes (ม.86/4).

toast.lineRequired: Add at least one line item

product.whtHint: Withholding rate differs per service category (rent 5% / service 3% / ads 2%)
product.quickCreateMissing: Enter a code and name first
product.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate this product? It will be hidden from new documents.

quotation.whtNote: Note: corporate customers withhold 3% WHT on the service portion.
quotation.searchProduct: Search product/service or type your own
quotation.noProduct: No product found — type the description
quotation.rejectConfirm: Confirm the customer rejected this quotation?

attachment.title: Attachments
attachment.allowedTypes: PDF, JPG, PNG, WebP, Excel, MSG

apiKey.title: API Keys
apiKey.name: Name
apiKey.revokeConfirm: Revoke this key? Calls using it will fail immediately. This cannot be undone.
apiKey.secretWarning: Save this key now — it will NOT be shown again.

vi.title: Vendor Invoices
vi.linkPoHint: Selecting an Approved PO of this vendor pre-fills the lines.
vi.claimHint: Claimable from the invoice month through +6 months
vi.attachmentAdvisory: Vendor tax-invoice file not attached yet
vi.attachmentAdvisoryHint: You can post, but the document is marked "incomplete" until you upload the vendor's tax-invoice file in the Attachments section below (RD audit evidence — ม.86/4, ม.82/4; required before the ภ.พ.30 filing).
vi.postWarn: Posting books Dr Expense/Input-VAT, Cr AP and is irreversible
vi.nonRecWarn: This category is non-recoverable VAT (ม.82/5) — VAT lumps into expense
vi.noInputVatInfo: ℹ Non-VAT vendor — Input VAT not claimable (VAT lumps into expense)
vi.pnd36Warning: ⚠ PND.36 reverse charge — input VAT auto-computed next month
vi.vatDInfo: ℹ Vendor registered for Thai VAT-D — claim Input VAT normally
vi.createFromPvHint: Purchase tax-invoice records are created from a payment voucher (PV → record).

vatThreshold.approaching: Sales nearing the 1.8M THB threshold — prepare to register for VAT
vatThreshold.exceeded: Sales exceeded the 1.8M THB threshold — must register for VAT within 30 days (s.85/1)

form.taxRateLocked: Tax rate is locked to the selected product/service

numberGaps.title: Number Gap Audit
numberGaps.subtitle: Sequential document numbering (Accounting Act) — should be empty
numberGaps.clean: No number gaps — document sequence is intact

login.title: Sign in to TEAS
login.mfaPrompt: Enter the 6-digit MFA code from your Authenticator app
